creator: stephen@missouri.edu
text:
On 01/26/2012 05:57 PM, scheidell@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: Port science/vis5d+ does not build.
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: scheidell
> State-Changed-When: Thu Jan 26 23:57:42 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why:
> Is this still an issue? this has been opened for almost a year.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=155105
>
>

Yes - it looks like it is still an issue:

http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.8.20120105090126/vis5d+-1.2.1_15.log

But based on conversations on ports, I doubt it will ever get fixed.

I think the PR should stay open.
